title: cordyline bellula
intro: Cordyline bellula, also known as the red cordyline or cabbage palm, is a plant species native to New Zealand and Australia, characterized by its striking red or purple leaves. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits. Cordyline bellula has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, such as wounds, fever, and skin problems, and its herbal preparations include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures. Furthermore, the plant's extracts have shown potential in reducing inflammation and improving immune function, making it a promising natural remedy for various health issues.
